intentSynonyms: look up recent changes in wikipedia
fetch a single recent changes in wikipedia
view one specific recent changes in wikipedia
list recent edits across wikipedia in wikipedia
description: Get recent edits made across Wikipedia. Returns article titles, editors, timestamps, edit summaries, and size changes. Filtered to article namespace (main content) edits only.

limit.description: Maximum number of recent changes to return (default 20, max 50)
